message:
test(fp-frame): grouped rolling min/max/count edge-case coverage (br-frankenpandas-4hkt)

x5oy shipped the Float64 window=2 baseline in
groupby_rolling_min_max_count_use_group_local_windows. 4hkt
complements with two orthogonal edge cases:

- groupby_rolling_min_max_count_int64_input_widens_to_float:
  Int64 input across two interleaved groups, window=2. Locks the
  Int64 -> Float64 dtype widening that pandas does on rolling
  aggregations (NaN must be representable for partial windows).
  Verifies value correctness for both groups and the dtype promotion
  on min/max/count outputs.
- groupby_rolling_window_one_emits_per_row_identity: window=1
  (degenerate). For each row: min == max == the row's own value;
  count == 1 for non-null rows, NaN for null rows. Locks the
  degenerate case against future min_periods-default drift.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
